---
page-layout: full
---

## 📄 Project Sources

### Documents

-   [Microbiome definition re-visited: old concepts and new challenges](resources/s40168-020-00875-0.pdf)

-   [phyloseq: An R Package for Reproducible Interactive Analysis and Graphics of Microbiome Census Data](resources/pone.0061217.pdf)

-   [PERMANOVA](resources/PERMANOVA_-_Department_of_Statistics.pdf)

-   [Waste Not, Want Not: Why Rarefying Microbiome Data Is Inadmissible](resources/pcbi.1003531.pdf)

-   [Mesures de la Biodiversité](resources/Mesures_de_la_Biodiversite.pdf)

-   [Guide pratique à destination des biologistes, bioinformaticiens et statisticiens qui souhaitent s’initier aux analyses métabarcoding](resources/article.pdf)

### Links

-   <https://clement.poupelin.pages-forge.inrae.fr/blog_open16s/>

-   <https://bioc.r-universe.dev/articles/SpiecEasi/SpiecEasi.html>

-   <https://joey711.github.io/phyloseq/>

-   <https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/vegan/index.html>
